name: STERIS plc
description: STERIS plc is a leading global provider of products and services that support patient care with an emphasis on infection prevention. The company offers a comprehensive range of solutions, including sterilization equipment, surgical instrument repair, and decontamination services for hospitals, surgery centers, and medical device, pharmaceutical, and biotechnology manufacturers. Headquartered in Ireland, STERIS operates globally to provide critical technologies and services that help ensure the safety and efficacy of medical procedures and products, ultimately supporting better patient outcomes through advanced infection control and sterility assurance solutions.
